# CFP-478: Phase 2 sub-PR b workflow heredoc migration

- **Issue**: #478
- **Status**: phase:요구사항

## 1. 사용자 요구사항 (verbatim — Phase 2 후속 CFP 까지 CODEOWNERS manual review 로 변경 차단)

Migrate 8 workflow YAML heredoc blocks to external Python scripts.
